docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF OCT-28-1998, GRANTED

WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HOLMES, MELVA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,929.00 FILED BY ARCENEAUX, EDGAR AS TO DEFENDANT HOLMES, MELVA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-23-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCENEAUX, EDGAR PETITION MAILED ON JAN 04, 1999
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARCENEAUX, EDGAR
CIVIL SUBPENA AS TO GEORGE BAUTO POS FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARCENEAUX, EDGAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLMES, MELVA $1,929.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,975.00, PLAINTIFF WAIVED APPEARANCE OF SUBPENAED PERSON GEORGE BAUTO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT HOLMES, MELVA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOLMES, MELVA
